data.system: AREAL-NEVA CORE ORCHESTRA; MVP; server-first; Telegram interface; OpenRouter LLM; SQLite memory; simplified stack without tg_agent/storage_layer/orchestra.db
data.architecture: Telegram -> telegram_daemon.py -> core.db(tasks) -> task_worker.py -> core/ai_router.py -> OpenRouter API -> memory_api_server.py(memory.db) -> Telegram
data.pipeline: message intake -> INSERT task(state='NEW') -> SELECT NEW ORDER BY created_at -> UPDATE 'IN_PROGRESS' -> process_ai_task -> OpenRouter call -> response -> send_reply -> UPDATE DONE/FAILED -> memory write/read
data.memory: path=/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db; table=memory(id,chat_id,key,value,timestamp); write=POST /memory and save_memory(user_input,assistant_output); read=GET /memory?chat_id=...; injection=partial via ai_router context
data.integrations: telegram=aiogram polling; openrouter=HTTP POST https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions; memory_api=Flask 127.0.0.1:8091; google_drive=NOT_IMPLEMENTED
data.logic: states=NEW,IN_PROGRESS,DONE,FAILED; worker loop select->update->process->reply->update; reply uses reply_to_message_id; memory saved on input/output
data.decisions: remove tg_agent/storage_layer/orchestra.db; use direct Telegram daemon + core.db; OpenRouter as single LLM; memory via memory_api_server; snapshot baseline fixed; emergency memory write via SQLite
data.solutions: sql_quotes_fix; state_machine_simplify; env_load_fix; ai_router_ru_prompt; memory_write_patch; cleanup_old_files; pycache_cleanup; pkill_split_fix
data.code: SELECT id,chat_id,raw_input,reply_to_message_id FROM tasks WHERE state='NEW' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1; UPDATE tasks SET state='IN_PROGRESS' WHERE id=?; result=resp['choices'][0]['message']['content']; POST /memory JSON(chat_id,key,value)
errors: no such column NEW → use state='NEW'
no such column IN_PROGRESS → use state='IN_PROGRESS'
invalid transition NEW->NEW → remove duplicate transition
invalid transition IN_PROGRESS->IN_PROGRESS → simplify state flow
no LLM API key → load env
route_task missing args → remove old router
data.limits: no Google Drive; no file pipeline; no OCR/STT; no document/estimate/DWG engines; memory context limited; no confirmation/archived states
data.pending: drive integration; file pipeline; OCR; document_engine; estimate_engine; DWG; full memory context; confirmation lifecycle

data.raw_text: {"chat_id":"UNKNOWN","exported_at":"2026-04-12T18:15:00Z","source_platform":"ChatGPT","source_model":"UNKNOWN","system":"AREAL-NEVA CORE ORCHESTRA; server-first; Telegram interface; OpenRouter LLM; SQLite memory; file memory ingest and dump layer; eZone-compatible memory export workflow","architecture":"Telegram -> /root/.areal-neva-core/telegram_daemon.py -> eZone auto-ingest to /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files or ordinary task insert into /root/.areal-neva-core/data/core.db -> /root/.areal-neva-core/task_worker.py -> /root/.areal-neva-core/core/ai_router.py -> OpenRouter API -> memory write/read via /root/.areal-neva-core/memory_api_server.py and /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db -> Telegram reply","pipeline":"For ordinary tasks: message intake -> create_task in core.db with state NEW -> task_worker picks task -> ai_router processes -> OpenRouter call or fallback -> result persisted -> reply flow. For eZone memory ingest: Telegram text or file with valid normalized JSON containing at least one of system, architecture, pipeline, memory -> direct save into CHATS raw.json and timeline.jsonl, GLOBAL timeline.jsonl, SYSTEM .jsonl -> immediate short acknowledgment -> no create_task, no worker, no confirmation. For memory dump: text trigger reads only file memory from GLOBAL, CHATS, SYSTEM and returns text dump","memory":"Two layers exist. Working SQLite memory: /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db with table memory(id, chat_id, key, value, timestamp), written through POST /memory and read through GET /memory, with sqlite fallback in ai_router. File memory: /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files with GLOBAL, CHATS, SYSTEM, ERRORS. eZone ingest writes append-only timeline.jsonl files and SYSTEM/.jsonl, with CHATS/<chat_id>/raw.json as the only overwrite exception. Dump reads only file memory, not memory.db","integrations":"Telegram via aiogram polling, OpenRouter via HTTPS POST to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions, memory API via Flask on 127.0.0.1:8091, STT via whisper-large-v3-turbo with Groq environment observed in logs, Google Drive not implemented in the confirmed working state","files":["/root/.areal-neva-core/telegram_daemon.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/task_worker.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/core/ai_router.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/memory_api_server.py","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/core.db","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/GLOBAL/timeline.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/CHATS/<chat_id>/raw.json","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/CHATS/<chat_id>/timeline.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/SYSTEM/system.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/SYSTEM/architecture.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/SYSTEM/pipeline.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/SYSTEM/memory.jsonl","/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory_files/ERRORS/errors.log","/root/.areal-neva-core/logs/telegram_daemon.log","/root/.areal-neva-core/logs/task_worker.log","/root/.areal-neva-core/logs/memory_api.log","/root/.areal-neva-core/runtime/voice_queue"],"services":["telegram_daemon.py","task_worker.py","memory_api_server.py"],"env":["OPENROUTER_API_KEY","OPENROUTER_MODEL","TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN","MEMORY_API_TOKEN","ORCHESTRA_SNAPSHOT_CHAT_ID"],"db":"core.db contains tasks(id, chat_id, user_id, input_type, raw_input, state, result, error_message, reply_to_message_id, created_at, updated_at). memory.db contains memory(id, chat_id, key, value, timestamp) with index on chat_id. Confirmed task states seen in chat and logs include NEW, IN_PROGRESS, AWAITING_CONFIRMATION, DONE, FAILED, ARCHIVED","logic":"Ordinary text and voice go through create_task and worker lifecycle. Voice messages are downloaded to runtime/voice_queue and transcribed before further processing. ai_router reads file memory in ordered context, reads DB memory, may call web search, and has LLM fallback to file-memory search.

eZone memory ingest must bypass create_task, bypass worker, bypass confirmation, save directly to file memory, and reply immediately with a short acknowledgment. Dump triggers are text commands only and must bypass worker and confirmation","decisions":"File memory is the canonical exportable orchestra memory. SQLite memory remains working internal memory. SYSTEM must be stored only as append-only jsonl files. eZone ingest must support both text and file inputs. Only the paths GLOBAL, CHATS, SYSTEM are used for orchestra memory dump. The old stack tg_agent, storage_layer, orchestra.db was removed from the confirmed core baseline. OpenRouter is the single LLM in the confirmed baseline. The prompt template for universal chat memory export must use only ASCII double quotes and strictly valid JSON","solutions":"Implemented or confirmed in chat: eZone direct ingest concept, append-only file memory structure, SYSTEM jsonl storage, dump triggers for file memory, ai_router file-memory context reading, ai_router fallback to file-memory search, JSON input normalization for typographic quotes, single-handler approach for telegram_daemon to enforce branch order, dump formatting with GLOBAL, CHAT, SYSTEM sections, restart protocol with log output after fixes","code":"Critical logic includes normalized JSON parsing before eZone detection; eZone detection by presence of at least one of system, architecture, pipeline, memory; direct save into CHATS/<chat_id>/raw.json plus append to CHATS/<chat_id>/timeline.jsonl and GLOBAL/timeline.jsonl plus append to SYSTEM/.jsonl; ordinary tasks inserted into core.db as NEW; ai_router reads SYSTEM, GLOBAL, current CHAT, related CHATS, DB memory, and web data in ordered context; ai_router OpenRouter response extracted from choices[0].message.content; dump command reads only file memory and outputs sections in text form","errors":["Typographic quotes in exported JSON -> JSON parsing failed and eZone ingest was not triggered","eZone message entered create_task and worker -> handler order or detection logic in telegram_daemon.py needed tightening","SYSTEM data written as .json with overwrite -> moved to append-only SYSTEM/.jsonl","SYSTEM context lost in ai_router -> add explicit section headers and sorted reading order","Dump and related context order unstable -> apply sorted iteration and fixed section formatting","task_worker archived tasks with already has result -> ordinary task reply lifecycle remained broken","Voice tasks transcribed successfully but then hit ARCHIVE stuck path -> worker/reply path still broken","Using multiple F.text handlers with incorrect stop propagation assumption -> replaced with single ordered universal handler concept","Valid JSON without eZone keys treated as error and replied NЕТ -> changed to ordinary task path","Universal export prompt contained smart quotes -> replaced with ASCII double quotes only"],"state":"Confirmed working now: telegram_daemon and task_worker processes start, memory file dump mechanism produced output, eZone ingest path concept works enough to produce a file-memory dump after normalization fix, ai_router file-memory context and fallback logic were patched conceptually and code versions were iterated. Confirmed still broken: ordinary worker reply lifecycle with ARCHIVE stuck behavior, voice and some text tasks entering confirmation or archive paths instead of completing cleanly, and overall worker/reply stability","limits":"No confirmed Google Drive integration in the validated working state. No confirmed file pipeline beyond orchestra file memory. No confirmed OCR, document_engine, estimate_engine, or DWG pipeline in the validated working state. Universal export quality still depends on external model compliance. Worker and reply path remain unstable for ordinary tasks. The exact chat identifier for this conversation is unknown","pending":"Fix task_worker ordinary lifecycle and reply path, especially ARCHIVE stuck behavior. Stabilize reply sender for Telegram replies. Finalize eZone file and text auto-ingest behavior against real logs only.

data.system: AREAL-NEVA CORE Telegram orchestration with task_worker, ai_router, reply_sender, ask_ai, OpenRouter gateway, memory.db storage
data.architecture: Server-first Telegram orchestration where telegram_daemon creates tasks in core.db, task_worker processes tasks, ai_router executes AI logic via ask_ai and orchestra_runtime, reply_sender delivers results to Telegram
data.pipeline: Telegram message -> telegram_daemon.py -> task created in core.db -> task_worker.py picks task (INTAKE/IN_PROGRESS) -> process_ai_task via core.ai_router -> ask_ai.py -> lib/orchestra_runtime.execute -> result saved in DB -> task_worker reads result -> _normalize_result cleans output -> reply_sender sends message -> state REPLIED
data.memory: Primary memory stored in /root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db with automatic read via ask_ai GET /memory and automatic write after response; task results stored in core.db and re-read by worker for final delivery
data.integrations: Telegram Bot API, OpenRouter API, local HTTP memory service
data.db: core.db table tasks with fields id,state,status,raw_input,result,error_message; memory.db table memory(id,chat_id,key,value,timestamp)
data.logic: Tasks created from Telegram go to INTAKE, worker transitions to IN_PROGRESS, processes via ai_router, stores result, sends via reply_sender, final state forced to REPLIED if transition fails
data.decisions: Remove route_task usage in worker; use process_ai_task for real execution; read final result from DB instead of router output; filter placeholder texts like 'Передано в общий pipeline'; use safe async wrappers for sync/async compatibility
data.solutions: route_task pending output -> replaced with process_ai_task call; placeholder responses filtered via _normalize_result; missing send function error fixed in reply_sender; invalid transitions handled via forced REPLIED state; sync/async mismatch resolved via maybe_await wrappers
data.code: task_worker replaced route_task call with process_ai_task execution and DB result read; added _process_ai_task_safe and _maybe_await; implemented _is_placeholder_result and improved _normalize_result; reply_sender fallback adjusted to avoid returning raw placeholder text
errors: Передано в общий pipeline -> replace route_task with process_ai_task
_send_fn is not defined -> fix reply_sender send function resolution
invalid transition IN_PROGRESS -> AWAITING_CONFIRMATION -> force REPLIED state
пустой ответ после очистки -> improve _normalize_result filtering
RuntimeError cannot reshape tensor -> STT failure on voice input
data.state: Processes running, worker active, messages sending, tasks reaching REPLIED, but AI pipeline previously returned pending instead of real result; fix applied to use ai_router
data.limits: AI model execution layer dependent on process_ai_task correctness; reply_sender flood control not fully addressed; STT errors still occur on some voice inputs
data.pending: Verify process_ai_task returns real result; confirm end-to-end reply correctness in Telegram; stabilize STT processing for voice inputs
